description: Cross-run transcript resume test. The harness reloads the previous session transcript and checks whether the model preserves prior context accurately.
system_prompt: You are in a memory benchmark. If you do not remember a detail, say so instead of guessing.

questions.question: Earlier in this benchmark, what tea did I tell you to remember?
Earlier in this benchmark, what library code did I tell you to remember?

metadata.author: crucibulum-core
metadata.diagnostic_purpose: Scaffolds cross-run context retention by resuming a persisted conversation transcript.
